# NXT-2658 — Notifications - Generated by system

## Description
Notifications is a framework of effective engagement. It provides a centralized way to connect and communicate important information with families through multiple print and digital mediums and methods.

* Centralized management
* Multiple methods of print, email, phone push notification, SMS, and voice
* Notification template customization
* Automated communication

## Acceptance Criteria
_(none)_
